untranslatable_reason: This signal describes a complex options strategy (covered call + protective put arbitrage) requiring multi-leg position tracking, option Greeks, strike price monitoring, and assignment logic. Standard price-based indicators cannot model: (1) simultaneous long stock + short call + long put positions, (2) option expiration mechanics and assignment rules, (3) guaranteed profit calculation based on option premiums and intrinsic values, (4) strike price equality constraints with dynamic monitoring. A backtest engine would need dedicated options chain data, assignment simulation, and position composition tracking.
translation_notes: Signal requires options pricing model and assignment mechanics not available in price/technical indicator framework. The arbitrage depends on call premium received and put premium paid, which are not expressible using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators.
